title: ceratostylis ciliolata
intro: Ceratostylis ciliolata, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis ciliolata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or extracts that can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment.
